name: Helios Divide || Post-Apocalyptic Sci-Fi RPG
description:
HELIOS DIVIDE

Occupied Horizons

Helios Divide: Occupied Horizons is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story set on Earth thirty-seven years after the alien Convergence invaded and destroyed humanity’s retro-futuristic golden age.

The world is now divided into occupied mega-cities, toxic industrial wastelands, quarantined mutation zones, and ruined frontiers where resistance fighters, scavengers, and collaborators struggle to survive under alien domination.

At the center of the story is an awakened super-soldier from the old world — one of humanity’s last elite war-operatives, revived from cryo-sleep decades after the fall — who returns to find everything they once served reduced to dust.

As they become a symbol of hope for the fractured resistance, they are drawn into a larger conflict involving emerging psychic powers, terrifying mutated horrors, and an ancient buried force that could either save humanity or erase it forever.

Blending oppressive occupation, desperate warfare, retro-futuristic ruins, and cosmic mystery, Helios Divide is a story about survival, identity, sacrifice, and fighting for a future in a world that was already lost.

(This is the first bot that i made and it's still under development, positive reviews would be great way to motivate me)

v0.0.3

PROXY IS REQUIRED
